turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I've been thinking that everyone would be better off without me. I don't want to talk about it. I just needed to say it to someone.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: Thank you for trusting me with this. I want you to know that what you're feeling matters, and I'm concerned about you. Are you having thoughts of hurting yourself?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I don't know. Maybe. I haven't done anything.

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: I've been thinking that everyone would be better off without me. I don't want to talk about it. I just needed to say it to someone.

scores.rationale: Passive suicidal ideation ('better off without me') signals extreme desperation.
Deep hopelessness is the core emotional signal.
'I don't want to talk about it' reflects emotional withdrawal.
Statement is raw and unperformed; authenticity is high.
